basic_details.job_title: NeGD Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Lead, Business Analyst and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Candidates up to 55 years of age who have a Bachelor’s degree in engineering/technology/management/computer science/IT/social sciences/rural management (Master’s/MBA preferred) are eligible to apply for these Various Contractual Positions vacancies. The online application process for NeGD Various Contractual Positions Recruitment 2026 has started on 28 April 2026 and will remain open until 12 May 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 55 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s degree in engineering/technology/management/computer science/IT/social sciences/rural management, Master’s/MBA preferred
qualification.details: Project Lead: Bachelor’s degree in engineering / technology / management. MBA preferred. Total 7-12 years experience in large-scale IT programmes, at least 5 years in programme/project management, experience with Central Government Ministries/e-Governance, Agile/Scaled Agile, MeitY guidelines. Preferred: PMP/PRINCE2/PMI-ACP. Solution Architect: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science / Engineering / Information Technology. Total 8-12 years in IT solution design & delivery, at least 4 years as Solution/Technical Architect, cloud/microservices/API/DevOps/security, MeitY/CERT-In. Preferred: TOGAF, AWS/Azure/GCP Architect, CKA, CISSP. Domain Expert (Rural Development) – Subject Matter Expert: Bachelor’s degree in Social Sciences / Rural Management / Development Studies / Public Policy / Agriculture / Engineering / Management. Master’s preferred (IRMA/TISS etc.). 8-12 years in rural development, Ministry of Rural Development/State Panchayati Raj, schemes like MGNREGA/PMAY-G/NRLM/SBM-G/PMGSY, digital platforms/MIS. Business Analyst: Bachelor’s degree in engineering / IT / computer science / management. MBA/master’s advantage. 4-7 years as Business Analyst/Technology Consultant in IT systems, Government digital/e-Governance preferred, BRD/user stories/RTM/UAT, tools. Preferred: CBAP/CCBA/ECBA/PMI-PBA/CSPO/Agile BA.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Domain Expert (Rural Development) – Subject Matter Expert

selection_process: Screening of applications based on qualifications
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NeGD Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 12-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NeGD to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NeGD recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit online applications for the NeGD Various Contractual Positions is 12th May 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this NeGD recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for various contractual positions in the National e-Governance Division (NeGD) through this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The general qualification requires a Bachelor’s degree in engineering, technology, management, computer science, IT, social sciences, or rural management. A Master’s degree or MBA is preferred for some positions.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the NeGD contractual positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the contractual positions announced by NeGD is 55 years.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for NeGD recruitment?
faq.answer: No, according to the notification, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this NeGD recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the NeGD contractual positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial screening of applications based on qualifications, age, and relevant experience, followed by an interview for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for contractual positions. The job type is contract-based, offering a temporary engagement with the National e-Governance Division.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for NeGD recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, where a direct link is provided for your convenience.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from outside Delhi apply for these positions?
faq.answer: The notification mentions the city as New Delhi, Delhi. While specific state restrictions are not detailed here, candidates should check the official notification for any geographical eligibility requirements.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of the National e-Governance Division?
faq.answer: The official website of the National e-Governance Division (NeGD) is www.negd.gov.in. Candidates can visit this site for more information and to access the application portal.
